summary: Vertical video (9:16) from DHS that opens on dark night-vision B-roll of an ICE raid under bold red-and-white animated captions ('Last week, ICE continued to capture criminal illegal aliens across the U.S.'), then runs a sequence of black-and-white arrestee mugshots each stamped with a red crime label (PREDATORY SEXUAL ASSAULT OF A CHILD, STALKING AND ASSAULT, SEXUAL OFFENSES AGAINST A CHILD, ATTEMPTED ARSON), with the DHS seal at the bottom. A voiceover speaks 'Leave now... we will find you, and we will deport you... America's borders are closed to lawbreakers'. There is no music track.
notable_text: Last week, ICE continued to capture criminal illegal aliens across the U.S.; PREDATORY SEXUAL ASSAULT OF A CHILD; STALKING AND ASSAULT; SEXUAL OFFENSES AGAINST A CHILD; ATTEMPTED ARSON; America's borders are closed to lawbreakers.
